purpose: Rerun Phase 12 EWC lambda sweep under manifest+rails, using corrected Phase 10 controlled rerun reference numbers. Replaces untrusted May-2 phase12_ewc_sweep.json.

experiments.name: Phase 12 EWC lambda sweep (lambda in {10, 1000, 10000})
experiments.notes: ResNet-18, Split-CIFAR-10 task_incremental, 40 epochs/task, 5 seeds, 3 lambda values. Reference numbers from phase10_controlled_rerun_20260509T132155Z.json.
